model.name: LBI v2 T6040 shadow
model.description: 60% Adjusted xHR/BBE score + 40% HR-Window Thunder score.

signalClassification.real_signal: raw xHR/BBE >= qualified-pool median AND HR-Window Thunder Rate >= qualified-pool median
signalClassification.visible_noise: one or both core rates below median; keep visible but evaluate separately
signalClassification.rationale: The shadow test should judge T6040's elite-contact claim, while keeping low-denominator ratio spikes transparent instead of filtering them off the board.

elevatedByT6040.t6040SignalReason: xHR/BBE and Thunder rate are both above the qualified-pool median.
